canonical_definition: Large Vocabulary Instance Segmentation (LVIS) is a dataset used here to evaluate a model's object-level classification performance when prompted with a visual region.
papers: Draw-and-Understand: Leveraging Visual Prompts to Enable MLLMs to Comprehend What You Want
MM1.5: Methods, Analysis & Insights from Multimodal LLM Fine-tuning
